message:
chore(scheduler,beads): reduce default scheduler capacity and sync issue tracker

- Reduce DEFAULT_SCHEDULER_CAPACITY from 256 to 64, lowering initial
  memory footprint for the common case of small task sets while the
  ScheduledSet grows dynamically as needed
- Sync .beads/issues.jsonl with latest issue state updates

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
